entities.name: ZipFile
entities.context: A file handling tool that emits events related to its entries.

entities.name: lazyEntries
entities.context: An option that affects how the ZipFile creates entries.

entities.name: open()
entities.context: A method related to the creation of the ZipFile.

entities.name: entry
entities.context: An event emitted by the ZipFile.

entities.name: end
entities.context: An event emitted by the ZipFile.

entities.name: error
entities.context: An event emitted by the ZipFile.

relationships.context: ZipFile can be created with the lazyEntries option.
open() method is referenced in the context of creating a ZipFile.
entry is an event emitted by the ZipFile when conditions are met.
end is an event emitted by the ZipFile when conditions are met.
error is an event emitted by the ZipFile when conditions are met.
